---
name: Component Test

colors:
  primary: '#2563eb'
  background: '#ffffff'
  surface: '#f8fafc'
  text: '#0f172a'

spacing:
  sm: 0.5rem
  md: 1rem

rounded:
  md: 0.5rem

components:
  button-primary:
    backgroundColor: '{colors.primary}'
    textColor: '{colors.background}'
    rounded: '{rounded.md}'
    padding: '{spacing.sm} {spacing.md}'
  jay:product-card:
    backgroundColor: '{colors.surface}'
    rounded: '{rounded.md}'
---

# Component Test
